response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song 'ラブミ！' (Love Me!) from on-screen text. 2. Confirmed the performer as Oozora Subaru. 3. Researched the song 'ラブミ！ Oozora Subaru' to confirm composer and retrieve lyrics. 4. Lyrics retrieved from multiple sources confirmed Takaaki Natsushiro as the writer. 5. Mapped scenes based on visual changes (song performance vs credits display vs final graphic).
response.global_summary: A concert clip featuring Oozora Subaru performing her song 'Love Me!' followed by a thank-you graphic.

scenes.description: Oozora Subaru performs the song 'Love Me!' on stage in front of a pixel-art themed backdrop. No credits are shown.

Always, affection comes first
Running on our runway
With sturdiness and luck as our shield
We advance, are you ready?
Even if we fall, even if we cry, we
Are used to it, our receiving is perfect
Thank you for smiling for me!
I can sing again
Life is full of anxiety, honestly I have no confidence
But I won't give up my spot next to you!
The miracle world where we met
I wonder how it looks in your eyes
